info.name: Trulioo Verifications API
info.description:
Trulioo's Normalized API for identity verification (KYC) and electronic identity verification (eIDV). Submit a Verify request with normalized PersonInfo, Communication, Location, NationalIds, and Documents fields and Trulioo's GlobalGateway routes the request across local data sources in 195+ countries. Returns a normalized VerifyResult with Record status, DatasourceResults, RecordStatus, and Errors. Companion endpoints retrieve transaction records, statuses, partial results, and downloadable document images.


Contact Support:
 Name: Trulioo Support
 Email: support@trulioo.com

request.description: Submit a Verify request to perform a KYC verification on a person. Trulioo selects the appropriate local datasources for the country specified in the `CountryCode` field, matches the supplied identity fields, and returns a normalized VerifyResult.
